title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
scenario: PPIP "Don't Share" selection results in "Share data" toggle being OFF in App Settings > General > Account after onboarding
steps: 1. Complete the onboarding flow in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. When the PPIP (Product Privacy Improvement Program) dialog appears, tap "Don't Share".
3. Observe that the dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The "Share data" toggle is shown as OFF with a description explaining that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared to improve the experience, with no personal information shared with third parties.
